title: Not So Shrimple (Reshrimpled)
description: Unofficial 1.20.1 Forge port of Not So Shrimple by peeko32213. Adds bait-summoned Crayfish variants, shipwreck Maneaters, the River-Prawn Greatclaw weapon, prawn food, and upgrade stones.
body: ![Preview](https://i.imgur.com/qEM4m1I.png) **Not So Shrimple is back on Minecraft 1.20.1.** This is an **unofficial Forge port** of [Not So Shrimple](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/not-so-shrimple-forge), originally created by **peeko32213**. All original content belongs to the original author and credited contributors. This port is distributed under the MIT License used by the original project. ## What Is This Mod? **Not So Shrimple** adds dangerous crustacean-themed creatures, animated weapons, upgrade items, and strange aquatic encounters to your world. This port keeps the spirit of the original mod while adapting it for **Minecraft 1.20.1**, **Forge 47+**, and **GeckoLib 4**. ## Creatures ### Crayfish ![Crayfish](https://i.imgur.com/FXdMCQw.png) Crayfish are hostile semi-aquatic mobs with multiple variants. They are tough, aggressive, and come with different visual styles depending on how they are summoned. In this port, crayfish no longer spawn naturally. Instead, they are summoned using a **Bucket of Bait**. Crayfish variants include: * Normal variants from regular water * Ice variants from cold biome water * Blood/fire variants from Nether lava * Rare special variants ### Maneater ![Maneater](https://i.imgur.com/BgAw8T0.png) The Maneater is a hostile shell creature found near shipwrecks. Its spawning has been reworked for this port so encounters feel more controlled and less spammy. Maneaters can appear near: * Shipwrecks * Beached shipwrecks Spawn rates are intentionally limited, making each encounter feel more deliberate. ## Bucket of Bait The **Bucket of Bait** is the new way to summon crayfish. Craft it using a bucket and raw fish, then throw it into water or lava. After a short delay, it has a configurable chance to summon a crayfish nearby. Summoning rules: * Throw into water to summon normal or ice crayfish * Throw into cold biome water for ice variants * Throw into Nether lava for blood/fire variants * The summoned crayfish appears nearby, not directly on top of the bait * Summoned crayfish briefly glow so they are easier to find ## River-Prawn Greatclaw The **River-Prawn Greatclaw** is a custom animated GeckoLib weapon. It features: * Heavy melee damage * Durability-based use * A ground-slam attack * A visual block-wave effect * Area damage that scales with fall speed The harder you fall, the wider the slam impact becomes. ## Items The mod also includes: * Raw Prawn * Cooked Prawn * Smithing Stones * Somber Stones * Purging Stone * Crayfish and Maneater spawn eggs Smithing and Somber Stones can upgrade supported equipment, with configurable caps and tag-based blacklist/whitelist support. ## Coming In A Future Update A new mob is already being prepared for a future update. It is not available in the current release yet, but development has already started. More details will be revealed once the creature is closer to release. ## Changes In This Port * Updated to Minecraft **1.20.1** * Updated to Forge **47+** * Updated to **GeckoLib 4** * Added a Creative Tab * Reworked crayfish spawning into the **Bucket of Bait** system * Reworked Maneater spawning to happen only near shipwrecks * Added River-Prawn Greatclaw slam block-wave visuals * Added config options for bait summoning and special sounds * Fixed crashes, invalid tags, loot table issues, animation parsing issues, model overlap/flicker issues, and config edge cases ## Requirements * Minecraft **1.20.1** * Forge **47+** * [GeckoLib 4](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/geckolib) * Java **17** ## Credits * Original mod: **peeko32213** * Original models and textures: **Alpha** and **Gec Master** * Minecraft 1.20.1 Forge port: **Y221** ## License This port is distributed under the **MIT License**. Original mod: [https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/not-so-shrimple-forge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/not-so-shrimple-forge) ## Community Follow the development of the mod, share ideas, and stay updated here: **YouTube:** [https://www.youtube.com/@YAPILabs](https://www.youtube.com/@YAPILabs) **Discord:** [https://discord.gg/KYGyy9jFCz](https://discord.gg/KYGyy9jFCz)
